description_long: This is a beaded necklace displayed on a contoured jewelry bust stand. The necklace features a series of round, multicolored beads, each with a glossy finish, strung together on a fine, dark cord. The beads appear to be made from a mix of materials, possibly glass or ceramic, and are arranged symmetrically along the lower half of the necklace, with smaller, darker beads completing the upper portion. The jewelry bust is made of a smooth, matte material, likely plastic or resin, and is mounted on a sturdy rectangular base. The necklace's clasp is not visible, suggesting it is positioned at the back of the bust. The overall presentation is elegant and designed to highlight the intricate beadwork and vibrant colors of the necklace.
description: A multicolored beaded necklace displayed on a smooth, contoured jewelry bust stand. The necklace features glossy, round beads arranged symmetrically on a dark cord.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the necklace's dark cord and a single central bead, with the bust's broad shoulders visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the necklace's beads curving around the neck.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the full arrangement of multicolored beads and the symmetrical design of the necklace.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the necklace's beads and the smooth contour of the bust's side.
